mapper.select: SELECT productid, category, name, description, image, price, status FROM product WHERE category = #{category} AND status = 'ON_SALE'
SELECT productid, category, name, description, image, price, status FROM product WHERE (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND status = 'ON_SALE'
SELECT productid, category, name, description, image, price, status FROM product WHERE productid = #{productid}
SELECT productid, category, name, description, image, price, status FROM product
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (productid, category, name, description, image, price, status) VALUES (#{productid}, #{category}, #{name}, #{description}, #{image}, #{price}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, image = #{image}, category = #{category}, price = #{price}, status = #{status} WHERE productid = #{productid}
UPDATE product SET status = #{status} WHERE productid = #{productid}
